metadata.description: Replicate a reference Word .docx's full typography (字体/字号/缩进/行距/页面设置/样式表/主题/页眉页脚) onto new content via the HTML bridge: drive Word + a browser through AppleScript on macOS, render Filtered HTML in the browser, push HTML+RTF through the system clipboard, paste into Word. Append-mode preserves the reference doc 100%.

plugins.name: word-format
plugins.description: Copy a reference Word .docx's complete typographic profile onto new content. Two modes: append (recommended) preserves page setup, style table, theme, headers/footers, font table verbatim by piggybacking on a copy of the reference doc; new-doc mode preserves only character/paragraph properties. macOS only — requires Microsoft Word for Mac + Chrome or Safari + Accessibility/Automation TCC permissions.
